message:
feat: Replace stub implementations with real functionality

- runtime.zig: Implement heap allocation for large lists (>64 elements)
- ThreadPool.zig: Add Windows SetThreadAffinityMask support
- traceback.zig: Implement real file reading for getSourceLine()
- inspect.zig: Add source file reading with SourceCache
- argparse.zig: Implement getSystemArgs() using std.process.argsAlloc
- unicodectype.zig: Add extended case table for special Unicode chars
- dynload_shlib.zig: Replace simulated dlopen with real std.DynLib
- lock.zig: Implement wakeOne() using std.Thread.Futex
- stack.zig: Add x86_64 and ARM64 inline assembly for context switch
- contextlib.zig: Implement RedirectStdout/Stderr with stream stack
- multiprocessing.zig: Add ChildRegistry for active process tracking
- site.zig: Implement Quitter objects with platform-specific EOF
- _sitebuiltins.zig: Add file search for Printer.getText(), help topics
- functools.zig: Implement SingleDispatch with type registry
- mock.zig: Add PatchRegistry for tracking active patches
